title: viola serpens var. canescens
intro: Viola serpens var. canescens, also known as pale wood violet, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the viola serpens plant, a perennial species in the violet family. The medicinal properties of Viola serpens var. canescens include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Viola serpens var. canescens can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
